---
title: "Learning as Energy Dissipation: Handling Inexact Surrogate Gradients in Decision-Focused Training"
authors:
  - "Shunyu Wu"
  - "J. Wang"
  - "J. Rao"
  - "X. Xiao"
  - "H. Cai"
year: 2025
venue: "IEEE/CAA Journal of Automatica Sinica"
status: "under-review"
type: "first-author"
doi: ""
url: ""
keywords:
  - "decision-focused learning"
  - "end-to-end optimization"
  - "energy dissipation"
  - "surrogate gradients"
selected: true
toc: false
---

**Status:** Submitted (IEEE/CAA Journal of Automatica Sinica, 2025)

This manuscript studies inexact surrogate gradients through an energy-dissipation perspective and develops more stable end-to-end decision-focused training dynamics.
